you can't swim at all but now i know

i'm natali i'm 16 and i've swum from

i used to be the youngest person to swim

the first time i swam alcatraz was when
i was 10 years old and i was inspired by
my friends who had swum it before me
we train once a week every sunday with
our open water swim team
from just alcatraz to the beach that
takes me around 35 to 40 minutes but my
fastest time is 27 minutes
57.5 right now
that water is freezing but you feel so

the water is mercury you can't really

and you feel like you're on top of the

but you're in the middle of the ocean
it's hard to have that mental strength
that you can do this because it's just
so dangerous and unusual to do it and so
whenever we

and it's really comforting to see that
